description: Configure the starting parameters for the Northwind Traders business in Manager.io. Set the start date to July 1, 2024 (2024-07-01) and record the following opening balances: 25,000.00 for Cash on Hand, 3,200.00 for Accounts receivable — Alfreds Futterkiste, 5,300.00 for Accounts receivable — Ernst Handel, and 4,750.00 for Accounts payable — Exotic Liquids.
